system.description:
Source: Anime 5E Mounts and Monsters, PDF p. 3.

Rules Summary: Tiny canine quadruped used as a bonded mount by small fae folk. It is quick, alert, socially bright, unusually effective around spirits or extraplanar beings, and uncomfortable around broad swift water.
system.communities: Used as mounts; otherwise small packs
system.statBlock:
CR: 1/8. XP: 25. Total Points: 54.

Abilities: STR 6, DEX 8, CON 12, INT 5, WIS 7, CHA 14.

Traits: AC Bonus, Combat Mastery, Edge with spirits and extraplanar beings, Heightened Senses, reduced Water Speed, and canine-style manipulation/speech limitations.
